description: Create serializer — accepts bundled files as write-only input on POST.

allowed_tools.description: List of pre-approved tools the skill may use.

compatibility.description: Environment requirements (intended product, system packages, network access, etc.).

description.description: What this skill does and when to use it. Max 4096 characters.

files.description: Bundled files to include with the initial version (scripts, references, assets).

content_type.description: MIME type of the file content.

path.description: File path relative to skill root, e.g. 'scripts/setup.sh' or 'references/guide.md'.

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file.

name.description: Unique skill name. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Max 64 characters.
